airline_disclaimers.note: You can check in up to 3 pieces of baggage, as long as their combined weight doesn’t exceed the baggage allowance in your booking confirmation. Each piece of baggage has to weigh less than 32 kg and shouldn't exceed the maximum dimensions of 165 cm (height + width + depth). For more details, visit flydubai Baggage Policy.
Hand baggage per guest of 7kg and a maximum dimension of linear 115 cm (45 in). For more details, visit Oman Air Baggage Policy.

fare_rules_summary:
--- Leg 2 Terms & Conditions ---
  Disclaimer: Penalty charges shared by the Airline are indicative and may change without any prior notice. Wego does not guarantee the accuracy of this information
  - Date change/Cancellation requests could be restricted with-in 24-72 hours before departure of the flight, depending on the airlines.
  - Please reconfirm the airline penalties prior to any amendments or cancellation.
  - All fees mentioned are per passenger.
  - Total Rescheduling charges = Reschedule Airline Fees + Fare Difference (If applicable).
  - The rescheduling/cancellation fee may also vary based on fluctuations in currency conversion rates. 
  - Partial cancellation is not allowed on the flight tickets which are booked under special discounted fares.
  * For any further assistance, please contact our customer support team at +202-21279930 / +971 - 45810300 or write to us at customersupport@wego.com
